event: Blizzard alert! If you have blow or ket on you, take a big bump. You piece of shit. Fuck you.
The color of silverware in China is changing rapidly. Everyone wearing black or white shoes take a big sip you basic fuck.
Suicide bomber! The first one to finish their drink gets to make two other people do the same.
A visit from doctor Pink! If you have any prescription pills in your possession or room that were not prescribed to you, go take one. Score!
Earthquake! Last person to get both feet off the ground takes a shot. Yea, spread em wide.
Pandemic! Everyone drinks. No exceptions. This is communism.
A visit from the IRS! Everyone drink ~20% of their remaining drink.
Vortex! Everyone passes their drink to the left. Unless, like, Tom's playing.
连环屁! All of the data on your phone has been shipped to Beijing.
Draft notice! Everyone born in an odd-numbered month drinks TWICE. Your parents' timing did this to you.
The Red River Runs! Last person to touch something red swings from handle.
Special Ultra Event #7!!! The first person to visualize a spinning red cube in their mind wins. Losers drink. Honor system.
Domain Expansion: Beverage Tsunami! Everyone with a drink must drink. Everyone NOT holding a drink shotguns. Why would you not have a drink in your hand?
Reverse Bullmoose! If you don't have a drink, go get one. Then shotgun it you shitbag. You must have a drink in your hand. It's not optional.
Rule # 2! No open drink on you? Fuck you. FUCK. YOU. Take an enormous pull, then go get a drink. You piece of shit.
Heavens Mandate! This sentence is filler text to ensure that people have trouble reading this rule so it takes longer to read. The rule, I mean. Last one to point at the ceiling drinks TWICE.
Border dispute! The person to your right.
Peace be with you! Greet your neighbors with peace.
Flash flood! Everyone holding their drink takes a sip. Everyone NOT holding their drink takes a shot.
Whistleblower! Everyone unlocks their phone and shows their last Google search. Group votes on the most concerning one. That person drinks.
